title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCVIII. Lullabies.
content:
My dear cockadoodle, my jewel, my joy,
        My darling, my honey, my pretty sweet boy;
        Before I do rock thee with soft lullaby,
        Give me thy dear lips to be kiss'd, kiss'd, kiss'd.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCVIII. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
